case_title: ABDELHAK, DOUAR VS WESCH, HENRY T.

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT WESCH, HENRY T.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESCH, HENRY T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDELHAK, DOUAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESCH, HENRY T. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDELHAK, DOUAR HEARING SET FOR APR-09-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ABDELHAK, DOUAR AS TO DEFENDANT WESCH, HENRY T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
DEF. REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT TO THE JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE DATE RESERVE IS MARRCH 12,1996 8:30 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-20-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-12-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-09-1996, GRANTED
